hero.title: Kasama: The Friend of Lola and Lolo
hero.subtitle: An app that helps Filipino families care for their elderly parents through medicine reminders, emergency alerts, and daily connection.

comic.title: Far from home? Kasama namin sila.
comic.subtitle: Hindi mo kailangang mag-alala. Kahit malayo ang pamilya, may Kasama sila araw-araw.
comic.panel2: "Oh, time for my vitamins! Salamat, Kasama."
comic.panel3: Peace of mind, wherever you are.
